mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORTS R JOIN MEMBER M1 ON R.MEMBER_ID = M1.MEMBER_ID JOIN MEMBER M2 ON R.TARGET_MEMBER_ID = M2.MEMBER_ID
WHERE UPPER(M1.NAME) = UPPER(#{keyword})
WHERE UPPER(M2.NAME) = UPPER(#{keyword})
WHERE UPPER(R.DETAIL) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'

SELECT R.REPORTS_ID ,R.POST_ID ,R.REPLY_ID ,R.REVIEW_ID ,R.TYPE ,R.REASON ,R.DETAIL ,R.STATUS ,R.CREATED_AT ,R.RESOLVED_AT ,M1.NAME AS MEMBER_NAME ,M2.NAME AS TARGET_MEMBER_NAME FROM REPORTS R JOIN MEMBER M1 ON R.MEMBER_ID = M1.MEMBER_ID JOIN MEMBER M2 ON R.TARGET_MEMBER_ID = M2.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY R.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT R.REPORTS_ID ,R.POST_ID ,R.REPLY_ID ,R.REVIEW_ID ,R.TYPE ,R.REASON ,R.DETAIL ,R.STATUS ,R.CREATED_AT ,R.RESOLVED_AT ,M1.NAME AS MEMBER_NAME ,M2.NAME AS TARGET_MEMBER_NAME FROM REPORTS R JOIN MEMBER M1 ON R.MEMBER_ID = M1.MEMBER_ID JOIN MEMBER M2 ON R.TARGET_MEMBER_ID = M2.MEMBER_ID
WHERE UPPER(M1.NAME) = UPPER(#{keyword})
WHERE UPPER(M2.NAME) = UPPER(#{keyword})
WHERE UPPER(R.DETAIL) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
ORDER BY R.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT R.REPORTS_ID ,R.MEMBER_ID ,R.TARGET_MEMBER_ID ,R.POST_ID ,R.REPLY_ID ,R.REVIEW_ID ,R.TYPE ,R.REASON ,R.DETAIL ,R.STATUS ,R.CREATED_AT ,R.RESOLVED_AT ,M1.NAME AS MEMBER_NAME ,M2.NAME AS TARGET_MEMBER_NAME ,CASE WHEN R.TYPE = 'REPLY' THEN (SELECT POST_ID FROM COMMUNITY_REPLY WHERE REPLY_ID = R.REPLY_ID) ELSE R.POST_ID END AS PARENT_ID FROM REPORTS R JOIN MEMBER M1 ON R.MEMBER_ID = M1.MEMBER_ID JOIN MEMBER M2 ON R.TARGET_MEMBER_ID = M2.MEMBER_ID WHERE R.REPORTS_ID = #{reportsId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE REPORTS SET STATUS = #{status},
RESOLVED_AT = NULL
RESOLVED_AT = SYSDATE
WHERE REPORTS_ID = #{reportsId}

choose.when: UPDATE COMMUNITY_POST SET STATUS = 'B' WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
UPDATE COMMUNITY_REPLY SET STATUS = 'B' WHERE REPLY_ID = #{replyId}
UPDATE ECO_SHOP_REVIEW SET STATUS = 'B' WHERE ESR_ID = #{reviewId}
